title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bharat Petroleum Global Group - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bharat Petroleum Global Group - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Bharat Petroleum Global Group in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bharat Petroleum Global Group:
Bharat Petroleum Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Petroleum Global Group!
